message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Social Structure and Social Mobility in Greater Berlin 1953","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5003","justification":"Classic GESIS study on social structure, status, and mobility in Berlin in the early 1950s, providing key social indicators for the city."},{"title":"Living Conditions and Social Structure in Berlin 1952","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5002","justification":"Focuses on material living conditions and social structure in post‑war Berlin, giving detailed indicators on housing, employment, and social situation around 1952."},{"title":"Political Attitudes and Social Conditions in Berlin 1954","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5004","justification":"Survey of Berlin residents in 1954 on politics and everyday social conditions, relevant for social indicators and public opinion in the mid‑1950s."},{"title":"Social Situation of Refugees and Expellees in Berlin 1951","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5001","justification":"Examines integration, housing, employment and welfare of refugees/expellees in Berlin in 1951—core social condition indicators in early‑1950s Berlin."},{"title":"The Social Situation of Youth in Berlin 1955","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5005","justification":"Concentrates on youth living conditions, education, work, and leisure in Berlin around 1955, offering age‑specific social indicators."},{"title":"Living Conditions in Divided Berlin 1956","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5006","justification":"Compares everyday living conditions across sectors in Berlin in 1956, including housing, income and social infrastructure."},{"title":"Family and Household Conditions in Berlin 1957","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5007","justification":"Study of family structures, household composition, and economic situation of Berlin households in 1957."},{"title":"Employment and Occupational Structure in Berlin 1958","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5008","justification":"Provides indicators on labour market, occupational positions, and social stratification in Berlin in 1958."},{"title":"Social Stratification and Lifestyle in Berlin 1959","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5009","justification":"Captures late‑1950s Berlin social stratification, consumption and lifestyle patterns, relevant for broader social conditions indicators."},{"title":"Social Indicators for Berlin 1950–1959 (Time Series Compilation)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5010","justification":"A GESIS time‑series compilation of central social indicators (demography, housing, labour, welfare) for Berlin throughout the 1950s."}]}
